next_cycle_directives.bolt_p0: #577 [E2E-FEED-XML-SCHEMA] DEFCON-0 priority — 5 days to Apr 30 Doppl VTO launch. Add e2e/feed-xml-schema.spec.ts covering /api/feed/google-merchant + /api/feed/pinterest + /api/feed/heureka. Use fast-xml-parser (already on devDeps). Read-only specs, SIGKILL-safe, no DB seeding. Each feed: HTTP 200 + content-type + parses-as-XML + correct namespace + at least one item + each item has required fields per platform spec (GMC: g:id+g:title+g:price+g:availability+g:image_link; Pinterest: id+title+description+link+image_link+availability+price; Heureka: ITEM_ID+PRODUCTNAME+URL+IMGURL+PRICE_VAT+DELIVERY_DATE).
next_cycle_directives.bolt_p1: If #577 lands quickly: pivot to #578 [E2E-ADMIN-PRODUCT-EDIT] — pairs with #566 create coverage to close admin product CRUD. Seed E2E-EDIT-${ts} product, hit /admin/products/${id} edit form, mutate price+name+available, verify PDP + listing reflect changes, afterAll deleteMany double-key cleanup per W-10 pattern.

cycle_4926_directive.priority_rationale: Cycle #4926 was a TWO-LANDING cycle (Bolt + Sage), continuing the C4922-onwards same-cycle dispatch cadence (5 consecutive two-landing cycles C4922-C4926). Sage's #574 conversion of browse-abandonment + cross-sell-follow-up brings tally to 11 BRAND-PASSED / 5 PARTIAL — only marketing shell trio (#576) + 2 intentional campaign shells remain. Bolt's #575 closed the last actionable e2e gap from Phase 7 coverage audit deferred-list (Gap D abandoned-cart token restore round-trip), with a notable cross-cutting fix: corrupt-cart branch in src/app/api/cart/restore/route.ts flipped 500->422 to use semantically correct Unprocessable Entity for client data shape errors. New backlog filed prioritises Apr 30 Doppl VTO defense (#577 feed XML schema e2e — silent regression in GMC/Pinterest XML would tank launch with zero UI signal) and admin daily-flow coverage closure (#578 product edit pairs with #566 create). Trace remains correctly idle on #367 recurring container — three consecutive cycles of audit-debt clean, Phase 8 W-row queue fully drained as of C4923. Streaks: 31-cycle green-gate (C4889-C4926), 56-commit lint-zero. Bectly gates: #14 GMC at DEFCON-0 with 5 days to Apr 30 — #577 filed as last-line-of-defense.
